authority.baseline_scope: Approved documentation-audit base; not a permanent assertion about future repository HEADs.

classifications.CURRENT_PUBLIC: Current documentation intended for public readers.
classifications.CURRENT_INTERNAL: Current engineering, research, risk, or operator documentation.
classifications.HISTORICAL: Preserved record of an earlier project phase.
classifications.SUPERSEDED: Preserved document replaced by newer controlling authority.
classifications.DESIGN_ONLY: Possible future design that is not current authorization.
classifications.EVIDENCE_IMMUTABLE: Human-readable evidence whose historical wording must be preserved.
classifications.MACHINE_REFERENCE: Primarily machine-oriented deterministic record or configuration.
